title: Summarize changes to a page or blog post
description: Now when Premium and Enterprise customers visit a page for the first time in a while, they can use Atlassian Intelligence to generate a brief summary of changes since their last visit. Use this feature to quickly catch up on changes to a project plan after an important review, or to get a sense of what you missed while you were on vacation.
